description_long: This is a white slip-on shoe with a low-cut design and a rounded toe, featuring a subtle geometric pattern embossed on the upper fabric. The shoe has a thick, slightly curved sole with shallow grooves along the side, suggesting flexibility and comfort for walking. The interior is lined in black, providing a visual contrast to the predominantly white exterior. The heel includes a small pull tab for easy wearing, and the overall construction appears lightweight and breathable. The shoe lacks any visible laces or fasteners, emphasizing its slip-on functionality. The design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A white slip-on shoe with a geometric patterned upper, thick flexible sole, and black interior lining, designed for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, geometric pattern on the upper, and the open slip-on entry.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the low-cut profile, thick sole with side grooves, and the pull tab at the heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel pull tab, black interior, and the shoe's symmetrical back seam.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the geometric pattern, sole grooves, and slip-on design.
